🎯 deCompose Presentation - Offline Guide

Due to browser security restrictions, modern presentations need to run through a local server. Here's how to run this offline:

Method 1: Python (Mac/Linux/Windows)

Open Terminal/Command Prompt in this folder and run:

python3 -m http.server 8080

Then open: http://localhost:8080

Method 2: Node.js (if installed)

npx serve

Then open the URL it shows (usually http://localhost:3000)

Method 3: VS Code

Install "Live Server" extension, right-click index.html → "Open with Live Server"

Method 4: One-Click Launcher (Mac)

Double-click the start.command file (if provided)

Why can't I just double-click index.html?

Modern browsers block JavaScript modules when loaded from file:// URLs for security. A local server is required.
